properties.name: Ulm Heights Trail - Main Route South
properties.description: A special tip is the panoramic hiking route in Ulm. Enjoy a beautiful view of Ulm Minster and, in good visibility, even the 93 miles long Alpine range!

properties.name: Belchensteig
properties.description: Scenic hiking trail in the Black Forest near Belchen.

properties.description: Scenic drive along the B500 Schwarzwaldhochstrasse through the Black Forest.

properties.name: Leg 2: Reno e Mosella
